_comment: Created with OWL2VOWL (version 0.3.5), http://vowl.visualdataweb.org [Additional Information added by WebVOWL Exporter Version: 1.1.7]

description.en: The Archetype Ontology for building engineering domain classifies buildings, building elements, layersets, and materials that can be assigned to existing building stock. As such, the classes offer to assign average values defined by typical building characteristics and serve as reasonable approximations when detailed building-specific data is unavailable.

comment.undefined: Building archetypes define and utilise core sets of representative construction structures and systems of a building type, formalised as exemplary buildings. BuildingArchetype os a ontrolled vocabulary (enumeration) containing named individuals (1..n)
A building type is a categorical classification of buildings based on the occupation type and other buiding-based characteristics.
